name: Stack Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until light.
2. Stir in the molasses; add eggs, one at a time, beating after each addition.
3. Mix flour, baking soda, and salt separately.
4. Add these dry ingredients to the creamed mixture alternately with milk, beating after each addition.
5. Grease and flour three 8 x 1 1/2-inch round baking pans.
6. Pour 1 1/3 cups batter into each pan. Refrigerate remaining batter.
7. Bake at 375°F until done, about 15 minutes.
8. Cool the cakes for 5 minutes before removing them from the pans and placing them on a rack to cool completely.
9. Clean and grease the pans again.
10. Repeat steps 5-8 with the remaining batter.
11. Spread applesauce between layers.
12. Top with whipped cream and sprinkle chopped nuts.
